mapper.sql: id, post_id, user_id, root_comment_id, parent_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, content, status, create_time, update_time, edit_count, deleted_by, deleted_reason, deleted_time, version
id, post_id, user_id, root_comment_id, parent_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, content, status, create_time, version
mapper.select: select from comment where status = 0 and post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY} and parent_comment_id is null order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select from comment where status = 0 and root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId, jdbcType=BINARY} and parent_comment_id is not null order by create_time asc, id asc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into comment() values( #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{rootCommentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{parentCommentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{replyToUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{version} )
mapper.select: select from comment where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY} for update
select from comment where root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by case when id = #{rootCommentId, jdbcType=BINARY} then 0 else 1 end, create_time asc, id asc for update
mapper.update: update comment set content = #{content}, update_time = #{updateTime}, edit_count = edit_count + 1, version = version + 1 where id = #{commentId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 0 and version = #{expectedVersion}

update comment set status = 1, deleted_by = #{deletedBy, jdbcType=BINARY}, deleted_reason = #{deletedReason}, deleted_time = #{deletedTime}, version = version + 1 where id = #{commentId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 0 and version = #{expectedVersion}
